fields.label: Invoice #
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sTranNumber FROM tblInvoice ORDER BY dtTranDate DESC

fields.label: Client (Bill To Name)
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sBillName1 FROM tblInvoice ORDER BY dtTranDate DESC
fields.notes: Stored as sBillName1 directly on tblInvoice (denormalized)

fields.label: Invoice Amount
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(dblTranAmount, 0) AS Amount FROM tblInvoice ORDER BY dtTranDate DESC

fields.label: Export Status
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sExported, '') AS ExportStatus FROM tblInvoice ORDER BY dtTranDate DESC
fields.notes: sExported: empty = not exported (Draft), non-empty = exported to GP

fields.label: Invoice Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtTranDate, 101) AS InvoiceDate FROM tblInvoice ORDER BY dtTranDate DESC

fields.label: Due Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtDueDate, 101) AS DueDate FROM tblInvoice ORDER BY dtTranDate DESC
